# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# sync-config.txt
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 格式：
#   # Platform          平台块（Surge / Clash / Quantumult X / Loon）
#   >>  path            文件路径（Surge 块为源文件；其他为输出目标）
#   # > Skip            跳过关键词（Surge 块 = 全局；平台块 = 仅该平台）
#   # > Builtin         静态注入块（内容原样写入输出文件）
#                       << path 引用文件作为输出头部
#                       锚点：注释 # 说明 // 关键词。关键词只匹配输出里的
#                       「段落开头注释」（如 # Google / # > Google），命中后
#                       把内容注入到该段落之后（关键词=子串、忽略大小写；
#                       URL 的 :// 不会被误判）。因此写 // Google 即可，无需
#                       担心撞到 "Google AI Studio" 或策略名 🔍 Google。
#                       rules 段支持多段多锚点：每个 # … // 关键词 各自成段、
#                       各按自身锚点插入；无锚点的内容插到 MATCH 之前。
#                       proxy-groups 段取首个 // 锚点（无则插到段首）。
#                       Clash 专属：注入的 RULE-SET / DOMAIN-SET 会自动生成
#                       对应 rule-provider，无需手写 rule-providers:。
#   # > Mapping         URL 映射（X => Y）；右侧留空表示路径不变仅规范扩展名
#   # > Rename          Provider 名称映射（stem => 自定义名称）
#   # > Gist            URL 反代（ReverseProxy => host）；平台块=局部，Surge 块=全局
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Surge
>> Surge/Profile.conf
# > Skip
Gateway
Speedtest

# Clash
>> Clash/Sample.yaml
# > Builtin
<< .github/scripts/sync-config/clash.ini
# > Gist
ReverseProxy => fastly.jsdelivr.net
# > Skip
ConnersHua
iCloud
Apple News
Apple TV
# > Mapping
VirgilClyne/GetSomeFries =>
Loyalsoldier/surge-rules => Loyalsoldier/clash-rules
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SukkaLab/ruleset.skk.moe/master/List/domainset/reject_phishing.conf => https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/SukkaLab/ruleset.skk.moe@master/Clash/domainset/reject_phishing.txt
# > Rename
rule-providers:
  Block => AdBlock
  HTTPDNS.Block => HTTPDNS
  ASN.China => CNASN
  Gemini => Google AI Studio
  GenAI => AIGC
  proxy => Global
  direct => China
  private => Private
  reject => Reject
  reject_phishing => Phishing
  cncidr => CNCIDR

# Quantumult X
>> Quantumult/Sample.conf
# > Builtin
<< .github/scripts/sync-config/qx.ini
# > Skip
iCloud
Apple News
Speedtest
# > Rename
[policy]
  Proxy => Outbound
  AdGuard => AdBlock
[filter_remote]
  Block => Adblock
  HTTPDNS.Block => HTTPDNS
  Spark => Mail
  ASN.China => ASN China
  iCloud.PrivateRelay => iCloud Private Relay
  proxy => Global
  direct => China
  private => Private
  reject => Reject
  reject_phishing => Phishing
  cncidr => CNCIDR

# Loon
>> Surge/Balloon.lcf
# > Builtin
<< .github/scripts/sync-config/loon.ini
# > Rename
[Remote Rule]
  Block => Adblock
  HTTPDNS.Block => HTTPDNS
  Spark => Mail
  ASN.China => ASN China
  iCloud.PrivateRelay => iCloud Private Relay
  proxy => Global
  direct => China
  private => Private
  reject => Reject
  reject_phishing => Phishing
  cncidr => CNCIDR

# Surfboard
>> Surge/Surfboard.conf
# > Builtin
<< .github/scripts/sync-config/surfboard.ini
